name: Bachelor's in Software Engineering
place: Mehran University of Engineering and Technology, Jamshoro
shortDesc: Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Software Engineering with focus on modern software development and practical projects.
KeyAchievement: Studying core subjects including Data Structures, Web Development, Databases, OOP, and Artificial Intelligence.
Completed multiple practical projects focusing on full-stack web development.
Gained strong foundation in software design, algorithms, and system architecture.
Collaborated in team-based university projects to build real-world software solutions.

name: Hack for Humanity - 2025
shortDesc: Ranked 20th overall and won the Public Voting Award among 100+ participating teams.
KeyAchievement: Built 'UniRide', a real-time student ride pooling platform to solve university commuting issues.
Developed backend using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB.
Implemented real-time ride updates using WebSockets with Socket.IO.
Designed responsive UI using Tailwind CSS and EJS templates.

name: Digital Marketing Certificate
shortDesc: Completed a professional Digital Marketing certification focusing on modern online marketing strategies.
KeyAchievement: Learned SEO, social media marketing, and online brand promotion strategies.
Developed skills in content creation and digital campaign management.
Gained understanding of analytics tools to measure marketing performance.
Applied marketing strategies to improve engagement on digital platforms.

name: SES Head Director – Videography
shortDesc: Leading the Videography Department at the Software Engineering Society, managing creative media production.
KeyAchievement: Directed videography and editing for university tech events and society activities.
Led a creative team responsible for filming, editing, and publishing media content.
Planned visual storytelling and media coverage for multiple student events.
Ensured high-quality video production and brand consistency across society platforms.
